ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Option to Acquire (KR)

Transaction: KRW 48,000,000,000 subscription for newly issued Series B preferred representing 18% post-money; Investor holds a 24‑month call option to acquire remaining voting shares at a price tied to audited FY2026 EBITDA.

Insider List: The Company shall maintain an insider list under the supervision of the Compliance Officer; Investor employees receiving the deck will be placed on blackout until KRX disclosure; breach constitutes a material covenant default.
